summary: Completed testing of Match the Following dropdown and Check Answer functionality. All backend APIs and frontend components verified working correctly.

backend_tests.test_homework_returns_shuffled_pairs_rig: PASS - GET /api/structured-homework/{id} returns pairs_left and pairs_right arrays
backend_tests.test_check_answer_mcq_correct: PASS - POST /check-answer returns {correct: true} for correct MCQ
backend_tests.test_check_answer_mcq_incorrect: PASS - POST /check-answer returns {correct: false} for wrong MCQ
backend_tests.test_check_answer_match_following_correc: PASS - POST /check-answer returns {correct: true} for correct match
backend_tests.test_check_answer_match_following_incorr: PASS - POST /check-answer returns {correct: false} for wrong match
backend_tests.test_hint_returns_hint_first: PASS - POST /hint returns {type: 'hint', content: '...'} from DB
backend_tests.test_structured_test_returns_shuffled_pa: PASS - GET /structured-tests/{id} returns shuffled pairs_right in objective_data
backend_tests.test_check_answer_response_structure: PASS - Response contains only {correct: boolean}, no answer revealed

frontend_tests.match_following_uses_dropdown: PASS - StudentAIHomework.jsx line 346 uses <select> element with sat-match-select class
frontend_tests.match_following_in_tests_uses_dropdown: PASS - StudentAITest.jsx line 357 uses <select> element with sat-match-select class
frontend_tests.check_my_answer_button_exists: PASS - Button with hw-check-btn class and 'Check My Answer' text appears after hint
frontend_tests.no_show_answer_button: PASS - No 'Show Answer' or 'Reveal Answer' button found after hint
frontend_tests.hint_box_displays_correctly: PASS - hw-hint-box with 'HINT' label shows pre-generated hint content
frontend_tests.shuffled_options_in_dropdown: PASS - pairs_right array from API used as dropdown options

backend_structured_homework.py.pairs_shuffling: Lines 158-162 - random.shuffle(rights) for match_following before returning
backend_structured_homework.py.check_answer_endpoint: Lines 310-329 - Returns {correct: boolean} without revealing answer
backend_structured_homework.py.hint_endpoint: Lines 252-307 - Returns pre-generated hint from DB, no LLM call
backend_structured_homework.py._check_student_answer: Lines 539-569 - Case-insensitive comparison for all question types

backend_structured_tests.py.pairs_shuffling: Lines 237-246 - random.shuffle(rights) for match_following in tests

frontend_StudentAIHomework.jsx.match_dropdown: Lines 333-365 - Uses <select> with pairs_right options, disabled for used values
frontend_StudentAIHomework.jsx.hint_section: Lines 210-255 - Shows 'Need a hint?' → 'Check My Answer' → result feedback
frontend_StudentAIHomework.jsx.check_answer_function: Lines 75-95 - Calls /check-answer API and shows correct/incorrect result

frontend_StudentAITest.jsx.match_dropdown: Lines 343-380 - Uses <select> with pairs_right from objective_data

seed_data_creation: Created homework 0290c5f7-53b3-49f3-9cf5-218dfffd94b6 with match_following, MCQ, fill_blank, true_false questions under English subject (for teacher4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the requirements are working: 1) Match the Following uses dropdown selects with shuffled right-side options (both homework and tests), 2) After hint is shown, 'Check My Answer' button appears (not 'Reveal Answer'), 3) /check-answer endpoint returns {correct: true/false}. Note: Student S001 is in 'Test School' while teacher4 is in 'Demo School4', so new homework created by teacher4 may not be visible to S001 due to school filtering.
